topic: three-part ratios and part-to-whole ratios with fractions
latex:
A certain recipe for snack mix calls for $5$ cups of pretzels, $3$ cups of cheese puffs, and $7$ cups of crunchy cereal. Write a three-part ratio representing the mix. Then write a part-to-whole ratio of crunchy cereal to the total snack mix. Finally, write a fraction in simplest form to express the proportion of crunchy cereal to the whole.

crunchy cereal : pretzels : cheese puffs $=$ \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_

crunchy cereal : snack mix $=$ \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_

Proportion of crunchy cereal (out of whole) $=$ \_\_\_\_
